collection_method.method: Automated collection using the google-play-scraper Python package in a Python 3.10 virtual environment.

steps: Removed duplicate reviews by review id and duplicate normalized review content.
Removed empty reviews and extremely short reviews with fewer than 3 cleaned tokens.
Removed punctuation, special characters, control characters, and emojis.
Converted numeric values to English text.
Normalized whitespace and converted all text to lowercase.
Applied lemmatization to the remaining tokens.
